## Git Checklist

- [ ] This PR has one clear purpose
- [ ] Branch name follows `feature/*`, `release/*`, or `hotfix/*`
- [ ] Commit messages follow `type(scope): subject`
- [ ] Unrelated changes are excluded
- [ ] Docs updated if structure or rules changed

- Follow-up tasks, risks, or release notes
